fallbacks: GBrain not enabled; keep decisions in OpenSpec

decisions: Keep nodes and workflows as the system foundation
Use Dify as the dominant workspace and governance model
Use Paperclip for operational visualization, evidence, approvals, and attention
Keep data pipelines, schedules, runtime data, versions, and plugins inside the active workspace
Separate debug from production and draft from published versions
blockers: Fresh production build is blocked by Google Fonts download failures
Fresh 390 px automation is blocked because the selected browser has no viewport emulation and rejected the isolated harness
nextActions: Review the selected Dify-led C direction with product stakeholders
Map the selected workspace shell onto existing routes, types, and API contracts
Re-run production build and 390 px metrics when the environment supports them
